review_text: Look, i loved the linear algebra course! the workload was heavy but doable and we had lots of assignments to keep me busy. dr mizrahi's help was amazing - his office hours were super helpful and he always replied to my emails. the material was really useful for real-life problems, making it easy to see how i could use these
